title: NotebookLM is now bigger than Gemini
summary: NotebookLM now has higher search interest than Google Gemini. Its core strength is the ability to ingest multi-format documents and provide grounded, accurate answers without hallucinations. It is recommended when accuracy matters and source documents in various formats need to be consulted.
